_README: This file lists Confluence pages that the AI should reference during triage.
Add new pages as your team creates them - no code changes needed.
HOW TO FIND A PAGE ID:
3. The page ID is in the URL: /pages/viewpage.action?pageId=XXXXXXXX
core_runbook    → Always loaded for every triage (L1/L2 troubleshooting guides)
pay_policy      → Loaded when ticket involves pay/payroll/overtime topics
scheduling      → Loaded when ticket involves schedules/shifts/rotations
time_entry      → Loaded when ticket involves punches/time entries/clocking
integration     → Loaded when ticket involves imports/exports/syncs/APIs
general         → Loaded when no specific category matches

pages.title: Common Issues & Troubleshooting Guide
pages.description: Master troubleshooting guide for L1/L2 support
pages.notes: This is the primary reference doc - always include

pages.title: Pay Policy Configuration Runbook
pages.description: How pay rules, OT thresholds, and FLSA settings work

pages.title: Schedule Management Known Issues
pages.description: Known issues with shift patterns, rotations, and schedule assignments

pages.title: Time Entry Processing Guide
pages.description: How punches are processed, validated, and rounded
